title: Project Coordinator
description:
📢 Job Advertisement – Project Coordinator
We’re Hiring: Project Coordinator 🌱

Do you enjoy planning, coordinating projects, and working on-site? Are you organised, detail-oriented, and passionate about delivering quality work? Join us as a Project Coordinator and play a key role in ensuring our landscape projects run smoothly from start to finish!

What You’ll Do:

✔ Assist in planning, scheduling, and coordinating landscape projects

✔ Support the Project Manager in daily site operations, manpower, materials, and equipment planning

✔ Coordinate with internal teams, subcontractors, suppliers, and consultants

✔ Conduct site inspections to ensure work quality, safety, and compliance

✔ Prepare project documentation such as progress reports, RFIs, and claims

✔ Monitor project progress and support cost and resource control

✔ Handle client and stakeholder communications and resolve site issues

What We’re Looking For:

Diploma / ITE in Landscape, Horticulture, Civil Engineering, Project Management, or related fields

At least 2–3 years of relevant experience in landscape or construction projects

Able to read and understand technical / construction drawings

Organised, proactive, and able to manage multiple tasks

Good communication and teamwork skills

Computer literate (Microsoft Office; MS Project / AutoCAD an advantage)

Valid Class 3 driving licence preferred

Risk Assessment Management Level 2 is a plus

What We Offer:

💰 Salary: $3,200 – $3,600 per month

🌴 Annual Leave: 14 days + MOM-compliant benefits

🌱 Career growth in a stable and fast-growing landscape company

🤝 Opportunity to work closely with experienced project professionals

📍 Location: 20 Jalan Lekar
🕒 Working Hours: Mon–Fri (8:00am – 5:00pm)

postedCompany.description:
OneO2Plants PTE. LTD.

Established in 2008, OneO2Plants is a subsidiary of Far East Flora – an integrated floriculture firm with over 40 years of experience. We endeavor to bring life and freshness to the space of every business in Asia by making our extensive range of plants and pots available for rent in your office space.

With our wide variety of plants and European pot designs, OneO2Plants can provide the options and service level you require. We are able to provide plant rental for offices, restaurants, hotels, commercial buildings, shopping malls, and events. Our rapidly growing clientele in Singapore can attest to our quality service, enthusiasm and reliability. With renewable annual rental contracts, our plant nurturers will visit your premises every fortnightly to ensure that your plants stay healthy and fresh throughout the year.

Our other services also include plants for events, plants for purchase and floral arrangements. Whichever service you require, you can be assured that customer satisfaction is our number one priority.
postedCompany.name: ONEO2PLANTS PTE. LTD.
